title: ima-evm-utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.6.2-2]
- Verify IMA signature to make sure it's correct (RHEL-105471)
- Drop old libimaevm.so.4 (RHEL-82797)

[1.6.2-1]
- ima-setup: run zipl after building initramfs for s390x (RHEL-72293)
- update to upstream 1.6.2 (RHEL-82793)
full_text:
[1.6.2-2]
- Verify IMA signature to make sure it's correct (RHEL-105471)
- Drop old libimaevm.so.4 (RHEL-82797)

[1.6.2-1]
- ima-setup: run zipl after building initramfs for s390x (RHEL-72293)
- update to upstream 1.6.2 (RHEL-82793)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20523-0.html
